action: Apply the available security update for the affected system. The vendor's recommended remediation: Update the CI agent package to version 2.3.4 or later and restart the agent service.
business_consequence: If exploited, this vulnerability could give an attacker a foothold on an internal system, which could be used as a step towards more sensitive systems.

path: asset environment non-production; technical severity band High
non-production asset with High severity → Medium
no public exploit available and no known exploitation
a patch is available and the finding is 5 days past the 90-day remediation threshold → Scheduled

risk_summary: This vulnerability carries Scheduled urgency because a vendor patch is available and open 95 days, 5 days past the 90-day threshold.

technical_detail.solution_text: Update the CI agent package to version 2.3.4 or later and restart the agent service.

time_horizon: Include this finding in the next planned remediation cycle.
title: Remote Code Execution in Internal CI Agent

top_factors.label: open 95 days, 5 days past the 90-day threshold
no public exploit is currently known for this vulnerability
